declaration: FLOW-46 Platform Agent is certified for Docker/Vault tenant auth, platform-governance role coverage, seed dependency declaration, server/client unit coverage, TypeScript checks, Chromium Playwright UI/topology/CRUD verification, and zero-failure close scans with a single audited tenant-scope specialist.
